title: Tripartite Consultation. For purposes of consultation, the Maritime
content: 21 Industry Tripartite Council (MITC) under Section 13 of R.A. No. 11641 shall be convened 22 by the Department to serve as a continuing forum for tripartite advisement and 23 consultation with the industry stakeholders on policies and programs pursuant to the 24 provisions of R.A. No. 10395 and R.A. No. 11641. 25 26 27 RECRUITMENT VIOLATIONS AND DISCIPLINARY ACTION CASES 28 29 30 Jurisdiction 31 32
